name: Valid XML Structure
description: Message must be well-formed XML with correct namespace declaration for the message type.
details: Validates XML syntax, proper nesting, and namespace URI matches the declared message type (e.g., urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pacs.008.001.08).

name: Mandatory Elements Present
description: All required elements must be present in the message. Missing mandatory fields cause immediate rejection.
details: Checks: GrpHdr/MsgId [1..1], GrpHdr/CreDtTm [1..1], GrpHdr/NbOfTxs [1..1], CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/EndToEndId [1..1], IntrBkSttlmAmt [1..1], Dbtr [1..1], Cdtr [1..1].

name: Field Length Compliance
description: All text fields must respect maximum length constraints defined in the schema.
details: Max35Text fields (MsgId, EndToEndId, TxId, InstrId) ≤ 35 chars. Max140Text (Ustrd remittance) ≤ 140 chars. Max70Text (street name) ≤ 70 chars. IBAN ≤ 34 chars.

name: Positive Amount Validation
description: All monetary amounts must be positive (greater than zero). Zero or negative amounts are rejected.
details: Validates IntrBkSttlmAmt > 0, InstdAmt > 0 (if present), and RtrdIntrBkSttlmAmt > 0 (for returns). Amount format: up to 18 digits with 5 decimal places.

name: Valid Currency Code
description: Currency codes in Ccy attributes must be valid ISO 4217 codes.
details: Validates against ISO 4217 active currency list. Common valid codes: USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CHF, CAD, AUD. Invalid codes (e.g., XXX for testing) cause rejection in production.

name: UETR Format (UUID v4)
description: UETR must conform to UUID version 4 format: 8-4-4-4-12 hexadecimal pattern.
details: Pattern: [a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-4[a-f0-9]{3}-[89ab][a-f0-9]{3}-[a-f0-9]{12}. The 13th char must be '4' (version) and 17th char must be 8, 9, a, or b (variant).

name: Rejection Requires Reason
description: When TxSts is RJCT, the StsRsnInf block with reason code is mandatory.
details: If pacs.002 contains TxSts=RJCT, then StsRsnInf/Rsn/Cd must be present with a valid external reason code (e.g., AC01, AC04, AM04, BE01, RC01).

name: Allowed Character Set
description: Message content must use only permitted characters. Special characters outside the allowed set cause rejection.

name: Valid Date Format
description: All date and datetime fields must use valid ISO 8601 formats with legitimate calendar values.
details: ISODate: YYYY-MM-DD. ISODateTime: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss[.sss]Z or with UTC offset. Month 01-12, day valid for month, no Feb 30 etc.

name: BIC/BICFI Format
description: Bank Identifier Codes must conform to ISO 9362 format: 8 or 11 alphanumeric characters.
details: Pattern: [A-Z]{4}[A-Z]{2}[A-Z0-9]{2}([A-Z0-9]{3})? — 4 chars bank code + 2 chars country + 2 chars location + optional 3 chars branch.

name: IBAN Checksum Validation
description: IBANs must pass MOD-97 checksum validation as per ISO 13616.
details: Move first 4 chars to end, convert letters to numbers (A=10, B=11..Z=35), compute MOD 97. Result must equal 1. Country-specific length validation also applies.

name: Transaction Count Consistency
description: NbOfTxs in GrpHdr must match the actual number of transaction blocks in the message.
details: Count of CdtTrfTxInf (pacs.008) or PmtInf/CdtTrfTxInf (pain.001) blocks must equal the value in GrpHdr/NbOfTxs. Mismatch indicates data integrity issue.

name: Control Sum Verification
description: If CtrlSum is present, it must equal the sum of all individual transaction amounts.
details: Sum of all InstdAmt values across transactions must equal GrpHdr/CtrlSum or PmtInf/CtrlSum. Currency-agnostic sum (raw numeric values).

name: FedNow Message Size Limit
description: FedNow messages must not exceed the maximum message size limit of approximately 100KB.
details: Total XML payload size should be under 100KB for FedNow processing. SEPA has different limits. Oversized messages may be rejected or require splitting.
